approvals.notes: Dry runs never send this header; apply requests must include it when approval is required.

tools.name: diag.snapshot
tools.description: Diagnostics snapshot (artifacts + bundle index)

tools.name: reviewKit.create
tools.description: Creates review kit bundle for stories or contexts

tools.name: brand.apply
tools.description: Applies brand tokens to repository artifacts

tools.name: billing.reviewKit
tools.description: Builds billing review kit bundle

tools.name: billing.switchFixtures
tools.description: Switches billing fixtures in repo contexts

tools.name: purity.audit
tools.description: Runs UI purity audit

tools.name: vrt.run
tools.description: Runs Chromatic/VR test harness

tools.name: a11y.scan
tools.description: Runs accessibility scans on curated stories

tools.name: release.verify
tools.description: Pre-release verification checks

tools.name: release.tag
tools.description: Tags release candidate

tools.name: tokens.build
tools.description: Builds token artifacts for storybook

tools.name: structuredData.fetch
tools.description: Fetches structured component/token/manifest datasets

tools.name: repl.validate
tools.description: Validates Agentic REPL UI JSON against the DSL and registry

tools.name: repl.render
tools.description: Applies REPL patches or full trees for preview generation

tools.name: catalog.list
tools.description: Lists component catalog with filtering and code references

tools.name: code.generate
tools.description: Generates framework-specific code from validated UiSchema

tools.name: design.compose
tools.description: Composes UiSchema from intent using layout templates and component selection

tools.name: pipeline
tools.description: Runs compose, validate, render, and code generation in a single call with optional schema persistence

tools.name: viz.compose
tools.description: Composes visualization schema from chart type, data bindings, and object viz traits

tools.name: health
tools.description: MCP server readiness and subsystem status

tools.name: object.list
tools.description: List OODS objects with optional filtering

tools.name: object.show
tools.description: Show full OODS object definition including traits and view extensions

tools.name: schema.save
tools.description: Persist a composed UiSchema by name from schemaRef

tools.name: schema.load
tools.description: Load a previously saved schema by name

tools.name: schema.list
tools.description: List saved schema metadata with optional filtering

tools.name: schema.delete
tools.description: Delete a saved schema by name

tools.name: map.create
tools.description: Create component-to-trait mapping between external design system and OODS

tools.name: map.list
tools.description: List component-to-trait mappings with optional filtering

tools.name: map.resolve
tools.description: Resolve external component to OODS trait mapping with property translations

tools.name: map.update
tools.description: Update an existing component-to-trait mapping by ID

tools.name: map.delete
tools.description: Delete a component-to-trait mapping by ID

connectors.notes: Apply requests must include the approval header value defined above.
Apply requires approval token and is rate limited to prevent context overrun.
